cit.basis: 30% IR (Impuesto sobre la Renta) on net taxable income under Ley No. 822, Ley de Concertacion Tributaria (LCT).

pago_minimo_definitivo.note: Definitive minimum payment of 1%-3% of GROSS income, tiered by taxpayer size. Annual IR payable = max(30% of net income, minimum on gross income). A net loss with positive gross income still triggers the gross minimum.

cit.note: Administered by the Direccion General de Ingresos (DGI).

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto al Valor Agregado) at 15%; exports zero-rated, certain basic goods exempt.

wht.note: Definitive withholding on payments to non-residents; rates vary by income type under the LCT.

social_insurance.note: INSS social security (integral regime, employers with 50+ employees at 22.5%) plus 2% INATEC training levy; simplified.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Pago minimo tier (1%-3%) depends on official taxpayer-size classification; caller supplies the applicable percentage.
Sector regimes, exemptions (zonas francas), relief, filing, and advance-payment rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
